description: Pinned dataset revisions for reproducibility of CheckLLM paper experiments.

gaia.notes: GAIA benchmark from Mialon et al. 2023 (arXiv:2311.12983). Gated on HuggingFace. Revision SHA pinned to current HEAD as of 2026-04-23; update this file and bump CITATION.cff when bumping the pin.

tau_bench.notes: Loader accepts data_root to point at a real tau-bench checkout. Synthetic fixtures under src/checkllm/benchmarks/data/tau_bench/ are not upstream content; see that directory's README.md for attribution.
